question: Will Trump Die Before June 30th 2026
reason: Recent medical exams show no immediate life-threatening conditions.
evidence: President Trump underwent a routine medical and dental checkup on May 26, 2026, at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center, with results reported as 'perfectly' normal.

The White House has previously disclosed that Trump has chronic venous insufficiency, a common condition in older adults that causes blood to pool in the veins, but this is not typically life-threatening.
Despite public concerns over his health, including visible bruising and swelling, there is no current evidence indicating an imminent risk to his life.
Trump is scheduled to turn 80 on June 14, 2026, and has maintained an active schedule, including frequent golf outings.
The White House continues to describe his health as 'excellent' and he remains actively engaged in presidential duties.
